# I-95 Lane Closures Planned at Coxendale Road Overpass

**TL;DR:** The Virginia Department of Transportation is closing two lanes on I-95 near Coxendale Road Overpass in Chesterfield County.

The Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT) has announced double lane closures on I-95 near the Coxendale Road Overpass in Chesterfield County. The alert did not specify the closure duration or purpose. Drivers in the affected area should monitor VDOT for updates on timing and any alternate route recommendations.

**Why it matters:** I-95 is a critical commuting corridor for Chesterfield County residents, so the lane closures could create significant traffic impacts during peak travel times.
